violations.text: Laminate lined shelving in kitchen Clear Bridge Dining room was observed in poor repair (composite wood exposed; laminate lining observed deteriorating). Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the undersides of baking muffin tins have an accumulation of rust and black residue. Equipment was taken out of service to deep clean. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The ceiling in the walk-in freezer has an accumulation of frozen condensate droplets. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

Coffee cup and brown residue were observed in the hand-washing sink in satellite kitchen. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC informed to cease practice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

Vacuum packaged imitation crab meat was observed thawing in the walk-in cooler with the packaging still intact. Product was still semi-frozen. Reduced oxygen packaged fish that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment/ removed from the packaging prior to thawing. Foods removed from packaging during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

The door to the outside (double delivery doors), are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

-Slicer coating where food lands after being sliced was observed missing and/or chipped. Per staff, work order is in place. Facility is using pan to catch sliced foods to avoid food contact on poor repair surfaces. -Several baking pans were observed in poor repair. Equipment taken out of service during time of inspection. COS. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2024

The cutting boards in the Memory Care Unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

The walls and coving in the Memory Care unit observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. -Per interview of staff, an order has been placed for repairs. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023
